SEARCH
Package bigFiles.files

Class BigTextFile

java.lang.Object
bigFiles.files.BigFile
bigFiles.files.BigTextFile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<String>
public class BigTextFile extends BigFile implements Iterable<String>
A BigData implementation for text files. Provides the exact same API as TextFile but handles files that exceed RAM by using disk-based indexing and streaming.
Author:
Elias Kassas

  • Constructor Details

    • BigTextFile

      public BigTextFile(File folder, String fileName, String extension) throws IOException
      Constructor for BigTextFile.
      Parameters:
      folder - Destination folder.
      fileName - File name without extension.
      extension - File extension (e.g., ".txt").
      Throws:
      IOException - If indexing fails.

    • BigTextFile

      public BigTextFile(String fileName) throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException

  • Method Details

    • buildIndex

      public void buildIndex() throws IOException
      Scans the file to record the byte position of every line. Enables O(1) seek performance for large files.
      Specified by:
      buildIndex in class BigFile
      Throws:
      IOException - If the file cannot be accessed.

    • read

      public void read() throws IOException
      Description copied from class: BigFile
      Reads metadata and rebuilds the index if the file has changed.
      Specified by:
      read in class BigFile
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.

    • write

      public void write(Object... args) throws Exception
      Overwrites the file with the provided arguments. If args is empty or null, the file remains unchanged (Save behavior).
      Specified by:
      write in class BigFile
      Parameters:
      args - Data to be written to the file.
      Throws:
      Exception - If writing fails.

    • append

      public void append(Object... args) throws Exception
      Appends data to the end of the file. Supports single objects or Lists of objects.
      Specified by:
      append in class BigFile
      Throws:
      Exception - If the operation fails.

    • getLine

      public String getLine(int lineIndex) throws IOException, ClassNotFoundException
      Retrieves a specific line by index without reading the whole file.
      Parameters:
      lineIndex - The 0-based index of the line.
      Returns:
      The content of the line.
      Throws:
      ClassNotFoundException
      IOException

    • iterator

      public Iterator<String> iterator()
      Returns an iterator that streams lines one by one from disk.
      Specified by:
      iterator in interface Iterable<String>

    • deletePhysicalFile

      public boolean deletePhysicalFile()
      Description copied from class: BigFile
      Deletes the physical file from the disk.
      Specified by:
      deletePhysicalFile in class BigFile
      Returns:
      true if successfully deleted.
